description_long: This lantern features a faceted, teardrop-shaped body with a predominantly purple exterior and translucent, pale yellow glass panels. A large, angular golden frame partially encircles the upper section, providing both structural support and decorative flair. The top of the lantern is capped with a hexagonal lid, from which a thick, twisted purple handle arches upward and around, attached at two points. A small, decorative tag with a swirling motif hangs from the handle, adding a whimsical touch. The glass panels are set into the lower half of the lantern, allowing light to diffuse outward, while the upper section is more opaque and solid. The overall design is ornate and fantastical, suggesting a magical or stylized urban setting.
description: A faceted purple lantern with pale yellow glass panels, a golden frame, and a thick twisted handle, featuring a decorative tag.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the hexagonal lid, twisted handle, and decorative tag most prominently.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the golden frame and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the symmetrical golden frame, glass panels, and central alignment of the handle and tag.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the handle's attachment and the lantern's faceted glass panels.
